active_profile_source: owner semantic contract and active route/profile

checks: owner gates and forbidden actions are explicit

downstream_design_force: all downstream stages inherit quality ambition and owner boundaries
S02/S05/S09/S13/rendered gate can consume owner targets

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: missing owner route, claim boundary, or external action boundary
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: quality ambition not translated into downstream controls
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
